# terrible_cisco_dnac_sensor_test_template_edit (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `_id` (String) The sensor test template unique identifier, generated at test creation time.
- `actionInProgress` (String) Indication of inprogress action.
- `apCoverage` (String) Sensor Test Template Edit's apCoverage.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `connection` (String) Connection type of test WIRED, WIRELESS, BOTH.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `encryptionMode` (String) Encryption mode.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `frequency` (String) Sensor Test Template Edit's frequency.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `lastModifiedTime` (Number) Last modify time.
- `location` (String) Location string.
- `locationInfoList` (String) Sensor Test Template Edit's locationInfoList.
- `modelVersion` (Number) Test template object model version (must be 2).
- `name` (String) The sensor test template name, which is the same as in 'templateName'.
- `numAssociatedSensor` (Number) Number of associated sensor.
- `numNeighborAPThreshold` (Number) Number of neighboring AP threshold.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `profiles` (String) Sensor Test Template Edit's profiles.
- `radioAsSensorRemoved` (Boolean) Radio as sensor removed.
- `rssiThreshold` (Number) RSSI threshold.
- `runNow` (String) Run now (YES, NO).
- `scheduleInDays` (Number) Bit-wise value of scheduled test days.
- `sensors` (String) Sensor Test Template Edit's sensors.
- `showWlcUpgradeBanner` (Boolean) Show WLC upgrade banner.
- `siteHierarchy` (String) Site hierarchy.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `ssids` (String) Sensor Test Template Edit's ssids.
- `startTime` (Number) Start time.
- `status` (String) Status of the test (RUNNING, NOTRUNNING).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `templateName` (String) The test template name that is to be edited.
- `testScheduleMode` (String) Test schedule mode (ONDEMAND, DEDICATED, SCHEDULED, CONTINUOUS, RUNNOW).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `version` (Number) The sensor test template version (must be 2).
- `wlans` (String) WLANs list.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `dnac_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco DNAC Python SDK
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
